name: io.github.adwiteeymauriya/ibkr-portfolio-builder-mcp
title: IBKR Portfolio Builder
description: Top-down IBKR research: 468 typed screeners tagged by strategy intent, news, account access.

environmentVariables.name: PUBLIC_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Public HTTPS URL the server is reachable at (must match what the MCP client connects to). Used as the OAuth issuer.

environmentVariables.name: AUTH_MODE
environmentVariables.description: Which auth mechanisms to accept: `both` (default), `oauth`, or `bearer`.

environmentVariables.name: LOGIN_PASSWORD
environmentVariables.description: Password for the OAuth `/login` consent step. Required if AUTH_MODE includes `oauth`.

environmentVariables.name: STATIC_BEARER_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Long random token accepted as `Authorization: Bearer <token>`. Required if AUTH_MODE includes `bearer`.

environmentVariables.name: SESSION_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: HMAC secret used to sign OAuth session cookies. If unset, a random one is generated at startup (sessions don't survive restarts).

environmentVariables.name: READ_ONLY_API
environmentVariables.description: Whether ib-gateway should block order placement at the API layer. Strongly recommended `yes`.
